name: Nevada Promise Scholarship
summary: Last-dollar scholarship covering up to three years of community college tuition and mandatory fees not met by other gift aid, for recent Nevada high school graduates.

award.notes: Last-dollar: covers tuition and mandatory fees remaining after other gift aid; up to three years at a Nevada community college.

deadline.notes: Time-sensitive — application opens in the senior year of high school and includes training meetings and community-service requirements. Verify the current cycle's deadlines.

other: Recent Nevada high school graduate meeting program age/timing rules
Attend a participating Nevada community college
Complete the application, required meetings, FAFSA, and community-service hours (verify current requirements)

provenance.source_name: NSHE System Administration — State Financial Aid
